title: Survival Craft: Remastered
description: Remastered version of Survival Craft ! (Does not support crossplay with the CurseForge version)
body:
![Survival Craft: Remastered](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/SurvivalCraft_Remastered/BH_CSR_header.webp)
✨A remastered version of Survival Craft!
![Description](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/SurvivalCraft_Remastered/BH_CSR_banner.webp)


✨More mods!

✨More biomes!

✨In a recent version of Minecraft!

✨Dungeons to explore!

✨More coming in the next updates!

⚠️ **THIS VERSION IS NOT COMPATIBLE WITH THE CURSEFORGE VERSION !!!**

Survival Craft: Remastered is still in Work In Progress ! Everything may change in the live release.
